SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-05-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-05-2008 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: BETSY JOHNSEN. PLAINTIFF PRESENT. DEFENDANT ALI ADAWE PRESENT. DEFENDANT YELLOW CAB NOT PRESENT. VICKIE YEUNG INTERPRETS ENGLISH/CANTONESE - CANTONESE/ENGLISH ON PLAINTIFF'S BEHALF. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HE, LIMIN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT ADAWE, ALI YELLOW CAB COOPERATIVE, INC. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
